key.name: start-date
key.description: The date from which the work-log plan (8h per weekday) is accumulated.

key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often to fetch notifications, in seconds.

key.name: show-banner
key.summary: Show a desktop banner on new notifications
key.description: When enabled, a desktop banner appears for newly arrived unread notifications.

key.name: max-items
key.summary: Maximum notifications shown in the menu
key.description: The number of notification rows displayed in the menu.
